subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Praise thou the Beloved of the worlds, for that from which all the learned ones and mystics of the earth are deprived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حمد کن محبوب عالم را که از آنچه جمیع علما و عرفای ارض محروم
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
